dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mapped short_window=5 to sma_5 and long_window=20 to sma_20. Signal uses crosses_above/crosses_below operators to detect moving average crossovers. Direction is LONG only since entry is bullish crossover. Exit condition is reversal crossover (sma_20 above sma_5).

backtest_rule.reason: Mapped short_window=5 to sma_5 and long_window=20 to sma_20. Signal uses crosses_above/crosses_below operators to detect moving average crossovers. Direction is LONG only since entry is bullish crossover. Exit condition is reversal crossover (sma_20 above sma_5).

source_rule_text: Enter long positions when a short-period moving average crosses above a long-period moving average; exit when the long-period moving average crosses above the short-period moving average.
